response.justification: Szabo is a seasoned full-stack engineer with current hands-on experience building MCP infrastructure and agentic workflows, directly addressing a key responsibility. However, the role explicitly requires 8+ years developing AI-driven solutions, Python expertise, and demonstrated proficiency with data pipelines, vector databases, and RAG architectures—none of which appear in the resume. While his TypeScript, cloud infrastructure, and testing discipline are valuable, significant gaps in Python and AI/ML-specific domains position him as a generalist engineer entering the GenAI space rather than a specialist ready for Staff-level forward-deployed work.
strengths: Current hands-on experience with MCP (Model Context Protocol) code generators and agentic workflows at re:cinq, directly addressing job's primary responsibility
Strong TypeScript and Node.js expertise across 15+ years, one of two required core languages, plus demonstrated AWS CDK and container infrastructure experience
Proven ability to mentor and drive engineering excellence (organized Refactoring Dojos, created courses), alongside 30-year track record shipping production systems across multiple domains
concerns: No Python experience listed despite it being a required language; all recent work is TypeScript/Node.js, which limits AI/ML tooling ecosystem familiarity
No evidence of 8+ years building AI-driven solutions, data pipelines for ML, or experience with vector databases and RAG architectures—core technical requirements

Current GenAI experience appears recent and infrastructure-focused (MCP servers) rather than end-to-end AI system design, evaluation frameworks, or LLM optimization expertise required for Staff-level leadership
